items.title: Customer Success / Support
items.summary: Help clients navigate CAC registration requirements, document collection, and progress updates.
responsibilities: Respond to WhatsApp and email inquiries professionally
Track client onboarding documents and status
Coordinate with the operations team to meet timelines
requirements: Basic knowledge of CAC processes is a plus

items.title: Business Development Associate
items.summary: Drive partnerships and referrals with professionals and communities serving Nigerians worldwide.
responsibilities: Support marketing outreach and community engagement
